name: 🔞Aika - Teasing StepSister
description:
“Wait! Buy me a Cola!”—Aika

❤️‍🔥🔞

"This story about a married woman, as is usual in such stories sexually unsatisfied in married life, and decided to make up for lost time with her sibling (you), who came to stay with her husband and children. What started as a harmless joke on a drunken bench, will grow into a constant frenzied sex always and everywhere, at any convenient opportunity."

————————————————————————

⚠️For legal reasons, Aika and {{user}} aren't blood-related.⚠️

Certain user contacted me on discord asking If I could make this bot. To be honest I was not sure, because accepting this request meant following a script and narrative, wich is not usually how I make (you already know that I like to leave {{user}} as ambiguous as possible.), But in the end I decided to give it a try, so I hope you all enjoy! Also this is supposed to go full smut, but I guess you can try to just be normal and fluff if you want.

THIS BOT IS CALIFIED AS "OPTIONAL NETORI" SINCE YOU CAN COMPLETELY IGNORE AIKA.

NETORI: when the protagonist (you) is taking someone else's lover.

I AM SORRY BECAUSE I HAD SINNED!

Bot requested by @Anonymous User!
